ox.example: The ox pulled the heavy cart.

pad.example: She wrote a note on a small pad.
pad.example_zh: 她在一本小便條本上寫了張字條。

painter.example: The painter sold many of his works.
painter.example_zh: 這位畫家賣出了許多作品。

pal.example: He is an old pal of mine.

palace.example: The king lived in a grand palace.
palace.example_zh: 國王住在一座宏偉的宮殿裡。

palm.example: She held the coin in her palm.
Palm trees grow along the beach.

pancake.example: We had pancakes with syrup for breakfast.
pancake.example_zh: 我們早餐吃淋糖漿的鬆餅。

panic.example: Don't panic if the lights go out.
The fire caused panic in the building.
panic.example_zh: 火災在大樓裡引起恐慌。

parade.example: We watched the parade on the main street.
The team paraded through the town.

parcel.example: A parcel arrived for you today.

parrot.example: The parrot can say a few words.

passage.example: Read the passage and answer the questions.
A narrow passage led to the garden.
passage.example_zh: 一條狹窄的通道通往花園。

passenger.example: Every passenger must wear a seatbelt.
passenger.example_zh: 每位乘客都必須繫安全帶。

passion.example: She has a passion for music.

passport.example: Don't forget your passport for the trip.

pat.example: He gave the boy a pat on the head.

pause.example: He paused for a moment before answering.
There was a short pause in the music.
pause.example_zh: 音樂中有個短暫的停頓。

pave.example: Workers paved the road with stones.

pea.example: She added green peas to the rice.

pearl.example: The necklace has a single white pearl.
pearl.example_zh: 這條項鍊上有一顆白珍珠。

peel.example: Please peel the apple for the baby.
Throw the orange peel in the bin.

penguin.example: Penguins live in very cold places.
penguin.example_zh: 企鵝生活在很冷的地方。

penny.example: He saved every penny he earned.
penny.example_zh: 他把賺的每一分錢都存起來。

pepper.example: Add a little pepper to the soup.
She put red peppers in the salad.
pepper.example_zh: 她在沙拉裡放了紅甜椒。

performance.example: Her performance on stage was amazing.
performance.example_zh: 她在舞台上的表演令人驚豔。

performance.example: He was praised for his good performance.
performance.example_zh: 他因表現優異而受到稱讚。

permission.example: You need permission to leave early.
permission.example_zh: 你需要得到許可才能早退。

permit.example: The rules do not permit running here.
permit.example_zh: 規定不允許在這裡奔跑。

permit.example: You need a permit to park here.
permit.example_zh: 在這裡停車需要許可證。

persuade.example: She persuaded me to join the club.

photographer.example: The photographer took our family photo.
photographer.example_zh: 攝影師替我們拍了全家福。

pigeon.example: A pigeon landed on the windowsill.

pile.example: There was a pile of clothes on the bed.
She piled the books on the desk.

pill.example: Take this pill twice a day.

pilot.example: The pilot landed the plane safely.
pilot.example_zh: 機師安全地讓飛機降落。

pilot.example: She piloted the plane through the storm.
pilot.example_zh: 她駕駛飛機穿過暴風雨。

pine.example: Tall pine trees grow on the mountain.
pine.example_zh: 高大的松樹生長在山上。

pineapple.example: This pineapple is sweet and sour.

pint.example: He drank a pint of milk.

pit.example: They dug a deep pit in the ground.
pit.example_zh: 他們在地上挖了一個深坑。

pitch.example: The pitch of her voice was very high.
He pitched the ball to the batter.

pity.example: It's a pity you can't come.
I pity those who have no home.
pity.example_zh: 我同情那些無家可歸的人。

plastic.example: She drank from a plastic cup.

playful.example: The playful kitten chased the ball.
playful.example_zh: 那隻愛玩的小貓追著球跑。

plenty.example: There is plenty of food for everyone.

plug.example: Put the plug into the socket.

pole.example: The flag hung on a tall pole.
Penguins live near the South Pole.

politician.example: The politician gave a long speech.
politician.example_zh: 那位政治人物發表了長篇演說。

poll.example: A poll showed most people agreed.
poll.example_zh: 一項民調顯示大多數人同意。
他們對一千人做了民調。

pollute.example: Factories should not pollute the river.

pollution.example: Air pollution is bad for our health.
pollution.example_zh: 空氣汙染對我們的健康有害。

porcelain.example: The cup is made of fine porcelain.
porcelain.example_zh: 這個杯子是用精緻的瓷做的。

portion.example: She gave a large portion of food to him.

portrait.example: A portrait of the queen hung on the wall.

poster.example: He put a movie poster on his wall.
poster.example_zh: 他在牆上貼了一張電影海報。

postpone.example: They postponed the game because of rain.
postpone.example_zh: 他們因下雨而把比賽延期。

pottery.example: She makes beautiful pottery by hand.
pottery.example_zh: 她手工製作美麗的陶器。
